scripts.build:ipadSwift: cargo swift package -y --xcframework-name Conundrum -p ios  && tsx ../../../scripts/post_cross_language_modifications.ts && pnpm run copy:extraSwift
scripts.build:macSwift: cargo swift package -y --xcframework-name Conundrum -p macos && tsx ../../../scripts/post_cross_language_modifications.ts && pnpm run copy:extraSwift
scripts.build:swift: cargo swift package -y --xcframework-name Conundrum && && tsx ../../../scripts/post_cross_language_modifications.ts && pnpm run copy:extraSwift
